title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure poses a significant threat to businesses relying on cloud services. By exploiting compromised CI/CD pipelines, attackers can deploy malicious code, potentially leading to data encryption, service disruptions, and financial losses.
recommended_actions: Conduct an immediate review of CI/CD pipelines to identify and mitigate vulnerabilities, including securing access credentials and implementing multi-factor authentication.
Deploy endpoint detection and response (EDR) solutions to monitor for suspicious activity within cloud environments.
Ensure regular backups of critical data are stored offline and test recovery procedures to minimize downtime in case of an attack.

title: Show HN: Open-source vulnerability scanner
description: New tool automatically scans dependencies for known vulnerabilities and suggests patches. Gaining traction in the security community.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity.

title: OS command injection in Dashboard Server interface in Universal Robots PolyScope versions prior...
description: OS command injection in Dashboard Server interface in Universal Robots PolyScope versions prior to 5.21.1 allows unauthenticated attacker to craft commands that will execute code on the robot's OS.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The OS command injection vulnerability in Universal Robots PolyScope allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary commands on the robot's operating system. This could lead to unauthorized control of robotic systems, data exfiltration, disruption of operations, or physical harm in industrial environments.
recommended_actions: Immediately update Universal Robots PolyScope to version 5.21.1 or later to mitigate the vulnerability.
Restrict network access to the Dashboard Server interface and ensure it is not exposed to the public internet.
Implement network segmentation and monitor for anomalous activity targeting robotic systems.

title: The E2Pdf – Export Pdf Tool for WordPress plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site...
description: The E2Pdf – Export Pdf Tool for WordPress plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the 'id' attribute of the `e2pdf-download` shortcode in all versions up to, and including, 1.32.17. This is due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping on the shortcode attribute. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Contributor-level access and above, to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages that will execute whenever a user accesses an injected page

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-7650.

title: Open redirection vulnerability in the latest demo version of the Cradle eCommerce platform. The...
description: Open redirection vulnerability in the latest demo version of the Cradle eCommerce platform. The vulnerability occurs in the login form endpoint, where the ‘returnUrl’ parameter allows redirection because the web application accepts a URL as a parameter without properly validating it. As a result, it is possible to redirect users from the legitimate website to external pages. An attacker could exploit this vulnerability to deceive users and redirect them from a trusted URL to a malicious one with

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-3318.

title: Weak credentials in the CashDro 3 web administration panel, version 24.01.00.26, where the...
description: Weak credentials in the CashDro 3 web administration panel, version 24.01.00.26, where the platform allows the use of numeric PINs for user authentication. The system supports the use of PIN-based credentials, maintaining compatibility with POS software integrations deployed since 2012. This could allow an attacker to easily perform a brute-force attack against a user and gain access by trying different PINs without the account being locked. Successful exploitation of this vulnerability could re

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in the CashDro 3 web administration panel allows attackers to exploit weak numeric PIN-based authentication through brute-force attacks. This could lead to unauthorized access to sensitive financial systems, manipulation of POS transactions, and potential data breaches.
recommended_actions: Implement account lockout mechanisms after a defined number of failed login attempts to prevent brute-force attacks.
Enforce stronger authentication methods, such as alphanumeric passwords or multi-factor authentication (MFA), to replace or supplement PIN-based authentication.
Regularly update and patch the system to address known vulnerabilities, including upgrading to a secure version of the software when available.

title: A vulnerability in Remote Spark SparkView before build 1122 allows an attacker to bypasses the...
description: A vulnerability in Remote Spark SparkView before build 1122 allows an attacker to bypasses the local connection check and achieve arbitrary code execution as root on the server side. Depending on implementation the vulnerability can be exploited by an unauthenticated attacker.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-6213.

title: The Sky Addons plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the `sky...
description: The Sky Addons plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the `sky-custom-scripts` custom post type in all versions up to, and including, 3.3.2. This is due to the custom post type being registered with `capability_type => 'post'` and `show_in_rest => true`, combined with insufficient input sanitization on the `sky_script_content` meta field and lack of output escaping when rendering scripts on the frontend. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Auth

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows authenticated attackers to inject malicious scripts into the website, which can lead to data theft, session hijacking, or defacement of the website. This can compromise user trust and lead to regulatory penalties if sensitive data is exposed.
recommended_actions: Update the Sky Addons plugin to the latest patched version as soon as it becomes available.
Implement a Web Application Firewall (WAF) to detect and block malicious scripts.
Restrict user roles and permissions to limit access to the `sky-custom-scripts` custom post type.

title: The NMR Strava activities plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via...
description: The NMR Strava activities plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the plugin's `strava_nmr_connect` shortcode in all versions up to, and including, 1.0.14 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping on user supplied attributes. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with contributor-level access and above, to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages that will execute whenever a user accesses an injected page.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5341.

title: The User Frontend: AI Powered Frontend Posting, User Directory, Profile, Membership & User...
description: The User Frontend: AI Powered Frontend Posting, User Directory, Profile, Membership & User Registration plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Deserialization of Untrusted Data in versions up to, and including, 4.3.1 This is due to insufficient input validation and type checking on the wpuf_files parameter during form submission, combined with unconditional deserialization via maybe_unserialize() when displaying post content. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Subscriber-lev

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5127.

title: In uriparser before 1.0.2, the function family EqualsUri can misclassify two unequal URIs as equal.
description: In uriparser before 1.0.2, the function family EqualsUri can misclassify two unequal URIs as equal.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in uriparser before 1.0.2 could lead to incorrect URI comparisons, potentially causing logic flaws in applications that rely on accurate URI matching. This may result in security bypasses, misrouting, or incorrect application behavior.
recommended_actions: Upgrade uriparser to version 1.0.2 or later to mitigate the vulnerability.
Review and test any application logic that relies on URI comparisons to ensure proper functionality after the update.
Monitor for any unusual behavior in systems that depend on URI parsing and implement additional validation checks if necessary.

title: The Auto Affiliate Links plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting in...
description: The Auto Affiliate Links plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting in versions up to, and including, 6.8.8 This is due to insufficient input sanitization on the 'url' POST parameter in the aal_url_stats_save_action() function and a complete absence of output escaping in aal_display_clicks(), where the stored value is echoed directly into an anchor element's href attribute and inner text without esc_url(), esc_attr(), or esc_html(). This makes it possible for unauthenticat

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-7330.

title: A vulnerability in Legion of the Bouncy Castle Inc. BC-FJA BC-FIPS on Linux, X86_64, AVX, AVX...
description:
A vulnerability in Legion of the Bouncy Castle Inc. BC-FJA BC-FIPS on Linux, X86_64, AVX, AVX-512f.

 This vulnerability is associated with program files gcm128w, gcm512w.



This issue affects BC-FJA: from 2.1.0 through 2.1.2.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in BC-FJA BC-FIPS could allow attackers to exploit cryptographic weaknesses, potentially leading to unauthorized access, data breaches, or compromise of secure communications. Systems leveraging the affected versions for cryptographic operations are at risk.
recommended_actions: Immediately upgrade BC-FJA BC-FIPS to a version higher than 2.1.2 to mitigate the vulnerability.
Conduct a comprehensive review of systems utilizing the affected library to identify potential exposure and implement compensating controls if an upgrade is not immediately feasible.
Monitor official advisories from Legion of the Bouncy Castle Inc. and apply any additional patches or mitigations as they become available.

title:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

xfrm: esp: avoid in-place...
description:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

xfrm: esp: avoid in-place decrypt on shared skb frags

MSG_SPLICE_PAGES can attach pages from a pipe directly to an skb. TCP
marks such skbs with SKBFL_SHARED_FRAG after skb_splice_from_iter(),
so later paths that may modify packet data can first make a private
copy. The IPv4/IPv6 datagram append paths did not set this flag when
splicing pages into UDP skbs.

That leaves an ESP-in-UDP packet made from shared pipe pages looking

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with unknown severity. CVE: CVE-2026-43284.

title:
Apache::Session versions through 1.94 for Perl re-creates deleted sessions.

The session stores...
description:
Apache::Session versions through 1.94 for Perl re-creates deleted sessions.

The session stores Apache::Session::Store::File and Apache::Session::Store::DB_File will create a session that does not exist.  This can lead to sessions being revived, potentially with data that was to be deleted.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with unknown severity. CVE: CVE-2013-10075.

title: In uriparser before 1.0.2, there is pointer difference truncation to int in various places.
description: In uriparser before 1.0.2, there is pointer difference truncation to int in various places.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in uriparser before version 1.0.2 involves pointer difference truncation to int, which could lead to incorrect memory calculations. This may result in unexpected behavior or crashes, but the likelihood of exploitation is low given the nature of the issue.
recommended_actions: Upgrade uriparser to version 1.0.2 or later to mitigate the vulnerability.
Review and test applications using uriparser for potential issues caused by this vulnerability.
Monitor for any updates or advisories related to CVE-2026-44927.

title: PredatorSense version 3.00.3136 to 3.00.3196 contain Local Privilege Escalation (LPE)...
description: PredatorSense version 3.00.3136 to 3.00.3196 contain Local Privilege Escalation (LPE) vulnerability.The program exposes a Windows Named Pipe that uses a custom protocol to invoke internal functions. However, this Named Pipe is misconfigured, allowing any authenticated local user to execute arbitrary code with NT AUTHORITY\SYSTEM privileges and to delete arbitrary files with SYSTEM privileges. By leveraging this, an attacker can execute arbitrary code on the target system with elevated privileges

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-8069.

title: Bitrix24 through 25.100.300 allows Remote Code Execution because an actor with SOURCE/WRITE...
description: Bitrix24 through 25.100.300 allows Remote Code Execution because an actor with SOURCE/WRITE permissions for the Translate Module can upload and execute code by sending a PHP file and a .htaccess file. NOTE: this is disputed by the Supplier because this is intended behavior for the high-privileged users who can upload new translated pages to the website.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with unknown severity. CVE: CVE-2025-67886.

title: Netgate pfSense CE 2.7.2 allows code execution by using the module installer with a backup file...
description: Netgate pfSense CE 2.7.2 allows code execution by using the module installer with a backup file with a serialized PHP object containing the post_reboot_commands property. NOTE: the Supplier disputes this because this installer is only available to admins and they are intentionally allowed to execute PHP code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in Netgate pfSense CE 2.7.2 allows authenticated administrators to execute arbitrary PHP code via a crafted backup file. While this requires admin access, exploitation could lead to full system compromise if an admin account is compromised or misused.
recommended_actions: Restrict access to the admin interface by implementing IP whitelisting and ensuring strong, unique passwords for admin accounts.
Monitor and audit admin account activity for any suspicious behavior or unauthorized access.
Apply updates or patches from Netgate if available, or consider implementing additional security controls to mitigate the risk.

title: The OttoKit: All-in-One Automation Platform WordPress plugin before 1.1.23 does not properly...
description: The OttoKit: All-in-One Automation Platform WordPress plugin before 1.1.23 does not properly sanitize user input before using it in a SQL statement, which could allow unauthenticated attackers to perform SQL injection attacks.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in the OttoKit WordPress plugin allows unauthenticated attackers to perform SQL injection attacks, potentially leading to unauthorized access, data exfiltration, or complete compromise of the affected database.
recommended_actions: Immediately update the OttoKit plugin to version 1.1.23 or later to patch the vulnerability.
Conduct a security audit of your WordPress installation to identify and mitigate any signs of exploitation.
Implement a Web Application Firewall (WAF) to detect and block malicious SQL injection attempts.

title: CVE-2026-7548 - A vulnerability was detected in Totolink NR1800X 9.1.0u.6279_B20210910. This affects the function su
description: A vulnerability was detected in Totolink NR1800X 9.1.0u.6279_B20210910. This affects the function sub_41A68C of the file /cgi-bin/cstecgi.cgi. Performing a manipulation of the argument setUssd results in command injection. The attack is possible to be carried out remotely. The exploit is now public and may be used.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in Totolink NR1800X allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary commands via command injection. This could lead to unauthorized access, data exfiltration, or full system compromise, potentially enabling attackers to pivot to other systems within the network.
recommended_actions: Immediately apply any available firmware updates or patches from Totolink to address the vulnerability.
Implement network segmentation to isolate vulnerable devices from critical systems and sensitive data.
Monitor network traffic for unusual activity and configure firewalls to block unauthorized access to the affected device.

title: CVE-2026-7536 - A vulnerability was determined in Open5GS up to 2.7.7. This vulnerability affects the function bsf_s
description: A vulnerability was determined in Open5GS up to 2.7.7. This vulnerability affects the function bsf_sess_add_by_ip_address of the file /nbsf-management/v1/pcfBindings of the component BSF. Executing a manipulation of the argument ipv4Addr can lead to denial of service. The attack can be launched remotely. The exploit has been publicly disclosed and may be utilized. The project was informed of the problem early through an issue report but has not responded yet.

description: A vulnerability was found in Open5GS up to 2.7.7. title: CVE-2026-22726 - Route Services can be leveraged to send app traffic to network destinations outside of an app's conf
description:
Route Services can be leveraged to send app traffic to network destinations outside of an app's configured egress rules. As a result, a malicious developer with access to Cloudfoundry could configure a route-service that would allow it to send requests to HTTP services on internal networks reachable by the Gorouter, which may not have previously had direct access from outside networks, or from the application.
Routing release: affected from v0.118.0 through v0.371.0 (inclusive); upgrade to v0.372.0 or greater. CF Deployment: affected from v0.0.2 through v54.14.0 (inclusive); upgrade to v55.0.0 or greater (includes routing_release v0.372.0).

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-22726.
